title: Crispy Flatbread with Tunisian Spices
description: A crispy flatbread seasoned with the warm, aromatic flavors of Tunisian spices, perfect as a snack or side.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spices
ingredients.notes: a mix of cumin, coriander, red pepper flakes, and paprika

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour and crispy.
Gradually add water to form a dough, kneading for 5-7 minutes.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired flatbread size.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Brush the tops with olive oil and sprinkle with Tunisian spices.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy and golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
